svg.title: Release Plate — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: 59W x 47H x 6D mm | Scale 8:1 (8 px/mm) | Material: PETG
4x Stepped Bores (2x2 grid, 40mm H x 28mm V) for JG PP0408W Union
4. Push rod boss: ⌀8 x 1mm proud, back face
5. 0.3mm x 45° lead-in chamfer at outer bore entry
6. 0.1mm chamfer at tube hole entry edge
